title: Trusty steeds help promote anti-social behaviour awareness
summary: The Council has been linking with Coventry Police this week to highlight the work they are doing to tackle anti-social behaviour in the city centre including action on the dangerous use of e-bikes.

title: Council reports budget savings despite rising pressures on key services
summary: Coventry City Council managed to come in £3.2m below budget in the last financial year, despite an unprecedented rise in demand for key services, thanks to careful financial management.

title: More locations to offer data support
summary: Coventry residents can now access data support from more locations across the city.

title: Coventry backs national Anti-Social Behaviour Awareness Week 2026
summary: Coventry City Council is proud to stand with organisations across the UK in support of Anti-Social Behaviour (ASB) Awareness Week 2026.

title: 5 things to know about the Renters Right's Act
summary: The renters right act came into effect in May 2026.

title: Joint inspections crackdown on illegal HMOs
summary: Coventry City Council’s Safer Housing and Communities team, along with partners, have carried out a series of targeted enforcement visits across the city.
